speedIndex.errorMessage: Speed Index indicates slow visual page loading progression.

largestContentfulPaint.errorMessage: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) exceeds acceptable Core Web Vitals thresholds.

cumulativeLayoutShift.errorMessage: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) indicates poor visual stability during page render.

totalBlockingTime.errorMessage: Total Blocking Time (TBT) flags severe main-thread JS execution delays.
